title.en: France cruise into semi-finals - could this be the best Les Bleus ever?
title.zh-CN: 法国队进入半决赛-这是有史以来最好的蓝天吗？

summary.en: World Cup winners in 1998 and 2018, France have created another special team and in beating Morocco showed why they are favourites to win the 2026 competition.
summary.zh-CN: 在1998年和2018年的世界杯冠军中，法国组建了另一支特别的球队，在击败摩洛哥的比赛中，他们展示了为什么他们最喜欢赢得2026年的比赛。

title.en: What's going on with penalties - is it time to end the 'stutter'?
title.zh-CN: 处罚是怎么回事--是时候结束“口吃”了吗？

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe's penalty miss in France's win against Morocco is the latest example of a player missing a penalty after stuttering in the run-up.
summary.zh-CN: 基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）在法国对摩洛哥的胜利中的点球失误是球员在晋级赛中口吃后错过点球的最新例子。

title.en: Mbappe mirrors Messi magic as World Cup's greatest storyline rolls on
title.zh-CN: Mbappe镜像梅西的魔力，世界杯最伟大的故事情节继续

summary.en: This summer's World Cup has been one of the most fascinating on the pitch in recent memory. Not because of the teams. Because of two men.
summary.zh-CN: 今年夏天的世界杯是最近记忆中球场上最迷人的比赛之一。不是因为团队。因为两个男人。

title.en: Guehi a doubt for Norway game with hamstring injury
title.zh-CN: Guehi对挪威比赛的怀疑，腿筋受伤

summary.en: England defender Marc Guehi is managing a slight hamstring injury and could miss Saturday's Norway quarter-final.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫马克·盖希（ Marc Guehi ）因轻微腿筋受伤，可能会错过周六的挪威四分之一决赛。

title.en: Quansah banned for two games after Mexico red card
title.zh-CN: Quansah在墨西哥红牌后被禁赛两场

summary.en: England defender Jarell Quansah receives a two-match ban for his red card against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫贾雷尔·昆萨（ Jarell Quansah ）因对阵墨西哥的红牌而被禁赛两场。

title.en: Klopp reveals how Liverpool tried to sign Mbappe
title.zh-CN: 克洛普揭示了利物浦如何试图签下姆巴佩

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp says he "flew around in a circle" in a private plane with Kylian Mbappe and his family when he tried to sign him for Liverpool a decade ago.
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）说，十年前，当他试图与利物浦签约时，他与基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）及其家人乘坐私人飞机“绕圈飞行”。

title.en: Spurs make offer for Kolo Muani - Friday gossip
title.zh-CN: 马刺为Kolo Muani出价-周五八卦

summary.en: Tottenham make an offer for Randal Kolo Muani but Juventus remain favourites to sign the forward, Arsenal are ready to finalise a deal for Christos Tzolis, Marcus Rashford's future at Barcelona could...
summary.zh-CN: 托特纳姆热刺向兰德尔·科洛·穆阿尼提出要约，但尤文图斯仍然是签下前锋的最爱，阿森纳已经准备好为克里斯托斯·佐利斯敲定一笔交易，马库斯·拉什福德在巴塞罗那的未来可能会...

title.en: Premier League pre-season - who are your club playing?
title.zh-CN: 英超联赛季前赛-您的俱乐部正在与谁比赛？

summary.en: The World Cup is still going on but Premier League clubs will soon begin their pre-season friendlies - who is your club taking on and when?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯仍在进行中，但英超俱乐部将很快开始他们的季前友谊赛-您的俱乐部将在什么时候接手？

title.en: US confirm Pulisic leg fracture in defeat by Belgium
title.zh-CN: 美国确认比利时击败Pulisic腿部骨折

summary.en: The United States confirm that forward Christian Pulisic fractured his leg during his side's 4-1 defeat by Belgium in the World Cup last 16.
summary.zh-CN: 美国证实，前锋克里斯蒂安·普利西奇（ Christian Pulisic ）在过去的16场世界杯上以4比1击败比利时队时，腿部骨折。

title.en: 'By far the biggest event ever in Norway'
title.zh-CN: “到目前为止，这是挪威有史以来最大的活动”

summary.en: Norweigian pundits look ahead to their quarter-final against England, described as the "biggest event ever in Norway".
summary.zh-CN: 挪威专家展望他们对阵英格兰的四分之一决赛，被描述为“挪威有史以来最大的事件”。

title.en: 'It was good vibes in there' - Stones on viral prank
title.zh-CN: “那里的氛围很好” -石头在病毒式恶作剧

summary.en: John Stones talks about the viral dressing-room injury prank that left England boss Thomas Tuchel briefly stunned.
summary.zh-CN: 约翰·斯通斯（ John Stones ）谈到了病毒性更衣室受伤的恶作剧，这让英格兰老板托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）短

title.en: Palace sign Spain defender Mingueza on free transfer
title.zh-CN: 宫殿标志西班牙后卫明格萨免费转会

summary.en: Crystal Palace sign Celta Vigo defender Oscar Mingueza on a free transfer, subject to international clearance.
summary.zh-CN: 水晶宫签署了Celta Vigo后卫Oscar Mingueza的免费转会，但需获得国际许可。

title.en: Norway shirts sell out before England match
title.zh-CN: 挪威衬衫在英格兰比赛前售罄

summary.en: Norway's performance has created huge demand for the football jerseys, but this hasn't been met by suppliers.
summary.zh-CN: 挪威的表现为足球运动衫创造了巨大的需求，但供应商尚未满足这一需求。

title.en: Eriksen to begin rehab in Denmark after collapse
title.zh-CN: 埃里克森在崩溃后在丹麦开始康复

summary.en: Midfielder Christian Eriksen will begin rehabilitation at home in Denmark after collapsing in an international friendly in June.
summary.zh-CN: 中场球员克里斯蒂安·埃里克森（ Christian Eriksen ）在6月份在国际友谊赛中倒下后，将在丹麦的家中开始康

title.en: Nobody can question integrity of World Cup referees - Collina
title.zh-CN: 没有人可以质疑世界杯裁判的诚信-科利纳

summary.en: World Cup officials are not "influenced by anyone" and "nobody can question the integrity" when it comes to decision-making, says Fifa chief refereeing officer Pierluigi Collina.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联首席裁判官皮尔路易吉·科利纳（ Pierluigi Collina ）表示，世界杯官员在决策时不会“受到任何人的影响” ， “没有人可以质疑诚信”。

title.en: Brentford sign Wilson after West Ham exit

summary.en: Brentford sign former England striker Callum Wilson on a 12-month contract after his exit from relegated West Ham.

title.en: Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup

summary.en: The prime minister says he does not want to "jinx it" but "ask me again if we get to the final".

title.en: Quansah banned for two games after red card vs Mexico

summary.en: England defender Jarell Quansah has been banned for two matches following his red card in their World Cup last-16 victory over Mexico.

title.en: Haaland: England should be confident - the pressure is on them

summary.en: Norway's Erling Haaland says England should rightly feel confident ahead of the quarter-final clash between the two sides, insisting the pressure is firmly on Thomas Tuchel's side to progress.

title.en: The World Cup quarter-finals are here! Your guide to every tie

summary.en: From 48, we're now down to just eight. The World Cup quarter-finals begin today - and we're one step closer to knowing who will lift the trophy on July 19.

title.en: Chris Sutton's World Cup quarter-final predictions

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the quarter-final ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Norway.

summary.en: Watch the full penalties as Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in the shootout to advance to the quarter-finals.

title.en: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties to reach quarter-finals

summary.en: Gregor Kobel is Switzerland's penalty hero, after pulling off a stunning shootout save from Colombia's Cucho Hernandez to help set up a quarter-final clash with Argentina.

summary.en: It's fast becoming a World Cup Golden Boot for the ages. But who will win it?
